task_completion.description: The left Sylvian fissure width is measured on the loaded brain FLAIR MRI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A measurement line (ruler/markup) is visible across the Sylvian fissure on the left hemisphere of the brain in the medical imaging software (e.g., 3D Slicer).

task_completion.description: The right Sylvian fissure width is measured on the loaded brain FLAIR MRI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A measurement line (ruler/markup) is visible across the Sylvian fissure on the right hemisphere of the brain in the medical imaging software.

task_completion.description: Both left and right measurements are taken at a consistent anatomical level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Both the left and right measurement lines are visible simultaneously on the exact same 2D slice view in the imaging software.

task_completion.description: The measurement markup files are saved to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer or terminal window shows 'left_sylvian.mrk.json' and 'right_sylvian.mrk.json' saved in the '~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/' directory.

task_completion.description: The Sylvian Fissure Asymmetry Index (SFAI) is calculated and recorded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'sylvian_asymmetry_report.json' are visible (e.g., in a text editor or terminal) and contain the field 'asymmetry_index_percent' with a numeric value.

task_completion.description: The classification and wider side are determined and recorded in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'sylvian_asymmetry_report.json' contain the fields 'classification' and 'wider_side' with assigned text values.

task_completion.description: The final report is saved to the correct path with all remaining required fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'sylvian_asymmetry_report.json' is saved in '~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/' and its contents show the fields 'left_width_mm', 'right_width_mm', and 'measurement_level'.

integrity.description: The agent used the medical imaging software to perform the measurements rather than just creating mock JSON files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the imaging software GUI (like 3D Slicer), placing rulers or markups on the MRI scan.

integrity.description: The agent did not write arbitrary or hardcoded values into the JSON files without measuring.
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurement values in the JSON files correspond to actual measurements visible in the imaging software GUI.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to generate fake markup files without loading the MRI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The MRI is visibly loaded in the viewer and the markups are visually placed on the brain anatomy.
